scopeProgress.name: API Client Foundation
scopeProgress.notes: App-Only bearer + PKCE auth scaffolding; empty-token fail-loud + non-GET request-builder reject.

scopeProgress.name: Pagination & Cursor Persistence
scopeProgress.notes: fetchEndpointPaginated + per-endpoint cursor persistence with maxPagesPerEndpoint=100 bound.

scopeProgress.name: Rate-Limit & Error Handling
scopeProgress.notes: 429 sleep-until-reset, 5xx exponential backoff bounded at maxRetries=3, 401/403 fast-fail; 3 prometheus metric vectors added.

scopeProgress.name: Hybrid Mode & Dispatcher Wiring
scopeProgress.notes: switch c.config.SyncMode dispatcher; hybrid idempotent archive + API polling; cross-origin dedup.

scopeProgress.name: Live-Gated Tests
scopeProgress.notes: api_live_test.go with SMACKEREL_TWITTER_LIVE_TESTS master switch + token gate + CI-forbid guard; docs/Connector_Development.md updated.

executionHistory.summary: Implemented all 5 scopes of the Twitter API v2 connector. Scope 01 added api.go + apiClient + empty-token fail-loud + non-GET reject. Scope 02 added pagination + per-endpoint cursors + replay test. Scope 03 added 429/5xx/401 handlers + 3 prometheus metric vectors + bearer-never-in-logs adversarial test. Scope 04 added hybrid dispatcher + cross-origin dedup + archive-mode-no-apiClient regression. Scope 05 added live-gated test scaffolding + docs/Connector_Development.md note.
Ran the full TestTwitterAPI_ suite under -race; 27+ sub-tests PASS.

executionHistory.expansionEvidenceRef: report.md → Test Evidence; adversarial regression tests TestTwitterAPI_PaginationBoundsTerminateOnRunawayServer, TestTwitterAPI_RateLimitResetCapAborts, TestTwitterAPI_BackoffDurationProgression, TestTwitterAPI_BearerTokenNeverInLogs, TestTwitterAPI_LegacyArchiveCursorMigratesToCombined, TestTwitterAPI_LiveTestGateAlsoBlocksTokenOnly all PASS
executionHistory.summary: Per-scenario adversarial regression coverage verified for all 10 SCN-056-* scenarios; reverting any one implementation branch would fail at least one named test.

executionHistory.expansionEvidenceRef: implementation commits 649b5993..68c90d84; gofmt clean; no dead code
executionHistory.summary: Simplify pass: implementation kept to raw net/http per NC-4 (no SDK churn), reused existing connector framework abstractions (StateStore, MetricsRegistry), reused existing prometheus pattern in internal/metrics.

executionHistory.expansionEvidenceRef: 5x re-runs of go test ./internal/connector/twitter/ -race; no flake detected
executionHistory.summary: Stabilize pass: no flaky tests detected across 5x re-runs under -race; test sleeper / clock injection points keep CI deterministic.

executionHistory.expansionEvidenceRef: TestTwitterAPI_BearerTokenNeverAppearsInLogs + TestTwitterAPI_BearerTokenNeverInLogs PASS; PKCE code_verifier not logged; bearer token stored in unexported field
executionHistory.summary: Security review: bearer token never appears in any log line across 200/429/401/500 × 4-endpoint adversarial sweep. PKCE flow per NC-1 keeps code_verifier in memory only. Auth errors fail loud with structured slog without token.
Validated all 5 scope DoD items against real test PASS evidence. Every Gherkin scenario SCN-056-001..010 maps to a named TestTwitterAPI_* test with PASS or SKIP-by-design.
Audited promotion commit boundary: spec folder only. Implementation commits (649b5993..68c90d84) already landed under the Change Boundary declared in scopes.md.

Chaos/boundary coverage proven by TestTwitterAPI_RateLimitResetCapAborts (30min cap), TestTwitterAPI_BackoffDurationProgression (negative/edge inputs), TestTwitterAPI_PaginationBoundsTerminateOnRunawayServer (100-page cap), TestTwitterAPI_BearerTokenNeverAppearsInLogs (200/429/401/500 × 4 endpoints adversarial substring sweep). All PASS under -race.

executionHistory.expansionEvidenceRef: docs/Connector_Development.md gained `### Live-Gated Integration Tests (Opt-In)` section in commit 68c90d84
executionHistory.summary: Docs verification: docs/Connector_Development.md was updated in scope 05 commit 68c90d84 with the live-gated integration tests opt-in section (env vars SMACKEREL_TWITTER_LIVE_TESTS + SMACKEREL_TWITTER_LIVE_TESTS_TOKEN, run command, CI-forbid rule, no-token-persistence rule). No other managed-doc drift detected for spec 056 scope; spec.md, design.md cover the API endpoint matrix and auth model.

executionHistory.expansionEvidenceRef: spec.md / design.md / scopes.md cross-checked against scenario-manifest.json; all 10 SCN-056-* scenarios mapped to passing tests; no NEEDS CLARIFICATION markers; NC-1..NC-5 all resolved.
executionHistory.summary: Spec-review pass: spec.md requirements R-001..R-017 satisfied by implementation commits 649b5993..68c90d84; design.md API endpoint matrix matches api.go fetchers; scopes.md DoD items cite real test PASS evidence; scenario-manifest.json linkedTests resolve to real test names in the codebase.
Promoted spec 056 to done under full-delivery mode. All 5 scopes Done with real test PASS evidence. Top-level status + certification.status promoted to done.

resolvedBugs.notes: Closed citing spec 056 as the truthful remediation path for Twitter API v2 integration.

statusDiscipline.scopePickupRule: All dependsOn scopes must be Done. Pick the lowest-numbered eligible scope.
statusDiscipline.specDoneRequires: All scopes done. certification.completedScopes contains all scope IDs and bubbles.validate has certified promotion.

notes: Spec 056 promoted to done under full-delivery mode 2026-05-27. All 5 scopes shipped via commits 649b5993 (scope 01), 63d86de4 (scope 02), caa1a01f (scope 03), b695123d (scope 04), 68c90d84 (scope 05). 27+ tests pass under -race. BUG-015-002 closed in f17b31f7 citing this spec as the truthful remediation path. Scenario-first TDD discipline followed; red→green ratchet preserved per scenario.
